scripts.install:all: npm --prefix shop-app install && npm --prefix product-list-app install && npm --prefix cart-app install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm --prefix shop-app start" "npm --prefix product-list-app start" "npm --prefix cart-app start"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "npm --prefix shop-app run build" "npm --prefix product-list-app run build" "npm --prefix cart-app run build"
